// src/App.tsx import { ShoppingCart, Heart, User, Search } from "lucide-react"; export default function HomePage() { const categories = [ { name: "Food & Drinks", image: "/images/categories/food.png" }, { name: "Smartphones", image: "/images/categories/smartphone.png" }, { name: "Furniture", image: "/images/categories/furniture.png" }, { name: "Shower", image: "/images/categories/shower.png" }, { name: "Clothing", image: "/images/categories/clothing.png" }, { name: "Electronics", image: "/images/categories/electronics.png" }, ]; const popularProducts = [ { id: 1, name: "Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra", price: "฿30,000", image: "/images/products/s22.png", }, { id: 2, name: "Shower Curtain Waterproof", price: "฿500", image: "/images/products/shower-curtain.png", }, { id: 3, name: "Smart Watch T500", price: "฿1,200", image: "/images/products/watch.png", }, { id: 4, name: "Laptop ASUS VivoBook", price: "฿25,000", image: "/images/products/laptop.png", }, { id: 5, name: "Headphones JBL Tune", price: "฿3,000", image: "/images/products/headphones.png", }, ]; const bestSellers = [ { id: 1, name: "หมูสามชั้นสไลด์", price: "฿199", image: "/images/products/pork1.png", }, { id: 2, name: "นมถั่วเหลือง Lactasoy", price: "฿20", image: "/images/products/lactasoy.png", }, { id: 3, name: "สบู่ Protex", price: "฿45", image: "/images/products/protex.png", }, { id: 4, name: "หมูสันนอกสไลด์", price: "฿199", image: "/images/products/pork2.png", }, { id: 5, name: "หมูสามชั้นหมัก", price: "฿220", image: "/images/products/pork3.png", }, { id: 6, name: "หมูสันคอสไลด์", price: "฿199", image: "/images/products/pork4.png", }, { id: 7, name: "หมูบดเกรด A", price: "฿180", image: "/images/products/pork5.png", }, { id: 8, name: "หมูสามชั้นชาบู", price: "฿210", image: "/images/products/pork6.png", }, ]; return (
